title: dittrichia viscosa subsp. viscosa
intro: Dittrichia viscosa subsp. viscosa, also known as sticky knapweed or stickyleaf sticky knapweed, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Herbal preparations of Dittrichia viscosa subsp. viscosa can be made in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
